About the Company

Built on Trust, Delivered with Precision

Sri Venkateswara Constructions is a reputed civil contracting firm with over 24 years of experience in residential, commercial, and institutional construction across Telangana. We maintain a highly skilled in-house workforce and adhere to the highest standards of quality and safety.

In-house team of 80+ skilled laborers, engineers, and supervisors, ensuring direct quality control at every stage.

Successfully executed residential projects up to G+7 floors, commercial complexes, and institutional buildings.

Currently undertaking high-profile institutional projects, including international-standard school campuses.

All licenses, registrations, tax compliance documents, and insurance certifications available for client verification.

What We Do

Complete Construction Solutions

From foundation to finishing, we handle every phase in-house with our skilled manpower and modern equipment.

01

Residential Buildings

G+1 to G+7 floor residential buildings, villas, and apartments with structural excellence and quality finishing.

02

Commercial Construction

Office complexes, shopping centers, warehouses, and mixed-use commercial structures built to international specs.

03

Institutional & Schools

Educational campuses, international schools, hospitals, and government buildings requiring precision engineering.

04

Structural Works

RCC framing, foundation work, retaining walls, and all structural civil works with load-bearing precision.

05

Renovation & Fit-out

Interior fit-outs, renovations, flooring, tiling, plumbing, and complete refurbishment projects.

06

Project Management

End-to-end project management including estimation, planning, procurement, supervision, and handover.

Why Choose Us

Credentials & Trust

📋

Full Legal Compliance

All contractor licenses, RERA registration, GST filings, and statutory documents are valid and available for verification upon request.

👷

Skilled In-House Workforce

80+ direct employees including civil engineers, site supervisors, masons, and skilled labor — no sub-contractor dependency.

🔩

Quality Assurance

We use only branded materials (Ultratech cement, TATA steel) and follow IS code standards with documented quality checks.

🛡️

Insured & Safe Operations

Workmen's Compensation Insurance and site safety protocols in place. Zero major accidents in 24 years of operation.

"

We were initially concerned about choosing the right contractor for our project. SR Constructions gave us complete confidence — their documentation, experienced team, and quality of work exceeded our expectations at every milestone.

RA
Ramanaiah Arithoti Civil Contractor, Founder – Sri Venkateswara Constructions
